docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SLADE, ANDREW
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANDREW SLADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING ON MAY 14TH, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,700.00 FILED BY SLADE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED NOV-16-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-12-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANDREW SLADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN MEDIATION AND WERE STILL INTERESTED IN RESOLVING DISPUTE AMICABLY, BUT RAN OUT OF TIME AS CALENDAR ENDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF ANDREW SLADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED INDICATING THE DEFENDANT BREACHED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLADE, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLADE, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON-DIAZ, CORY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SLADE, ANDREW

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINITFF ANDREW SLADE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORY WILSON-DIAZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.
